case_title: AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY VS. RAYMOND ZHANG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-13-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-27-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
